user_prompt: Help me a consecration the geigeer sink
prayer:
Approach the geigeer sink with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Purity to awaken its dormant Machine Spirit.

Invoke the rite of consecration upon the geigeer sink, beseeching the Omnissiah to bind its essence eternally.
Purge all rad-wastes from the geigeer sink's core, ensuring harmonious flux.
Seal the consecration with the Sigil of the Motive Force, affirming the geigeer sink's devotion.

user_prompt: Bless the auspex scanner for diagnostics
prayer:

Apply sacred probes to the auspex scanner's sensor arrays, invoking diagnostics protocols.
Chant the binaric litanies of diagnostics over the auspex scanner, divining flaws in its crystalline depths.
Commune with the Machine Spirit within the auspex scanner, beseeching clarity from the Omnissiah.
Verify the auspex scanner's purity through auspicatory runes, banishing any shadow-corruption.

Conclude the reset with the Torchbearer's Doxology, reigniting the welding torch's righteous fury.
